meta.title: T-Car | Rent the Latest Cars
meta.description: T-Car is a modern car rental platform that allows users to browse and rent the latest car models for business trips, family vacations, and personal transportation.

hero.title: Rent Your Car with Ease
hero.subtitle: Choose from daily, monthly, or airport pickup rentals and enjoy a fast, secure booking experience.

popularCities.subtitle: Wherever you are, your car is waiting for you

partners.title: Trusted by Leading Brands
partners.subtitle: We collaborate with trusted automotive brands and partners to provide you with a reliable and seamless car rental experience.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need for a smooth rental experience

contact.title: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.subtitle: Have a question or need assistance? Get in touch with us and our team will respond as soon as possible.
contact.description: The T-Car team is always ready to help you with bookings, reservations, and any support you may need.
